metadata.name: Create an Upsell Offer in the Cart

description: When a customer adds a specific product to their cart, the system should offer them a related, more premium product as an upsell.

nodes.task_description: Detect when a specific item (e.g., 'Standard Headphones') is added to the cart.

expected_outcome.value: System correctly identifies the trigger product.

nodes.task_description: Based on a predefined rule, display a promotion for a related, higher-margin item (e.g., 'Noise-Cancelling Headphones').

expected_outcome.value: System shows a relevant upsell offer to the customer in the cart view.
